text.title: llamaindex-ingestion-pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for llamaindex-ingestion-pipeline as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using chunk_size=256 without increasing chunk_overlap proportionally.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: At 256 tokens, chunk_overlap=20 (default) covers only ~8% of the chunk — boundary context is nearly absent. At small chunk sizes, set overlap to at least 25% of chunk size.
